description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 26,150 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This staff of dark wood is stouter and sturdier than most magical staves, with a gnarled and twisted knot of wood at the top end. It allows use of the following spells: Enlarge person (1 charge) Reduce person (1 charge) Shrink item (2 charges) Mass enlarge person (3 charges) Mass reduce person (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells enlarge person, mass enlarge person, mass reduce person, reduce person, shrink item; Cost 13,075 gp.
